name: Apple Crisp Oven Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a jelly roll pan.
3. Mix oats, 1/4 cup Bisquick, brown sugar, butter (or margarine), and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the remaining ingredients with a whisk until well blended.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread it to the edges.
6. Sprinkle the oats mixture evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Bake for 14 to 16 minutes, or until light golden brown.
8. Cut into 6 pieces and serve.
